steps.title: Spot the structural movement
steps.content: The passage opens with a general claim about lost films, then uses “For example” to introduce specific cases.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content:
This is a general-to-specific structure: a broad statement illustrated by concrete examples.

C directly describes this pattern; the other choices either misframe the examples as problem-solving attempts (A), invent a non-existent debate (B), or focus on comparing individuals instead of illustrating a general situation (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
